_comment: WebhookConfig fixture for the workflowsToStart pattern (wait_for_webhook_workflowstostart_target_test.json). Unlike receiverWorkflowNamesToVersions (which routes events to waiting tasks in running workflows), workflowsToStart launches a NEW workflow instance on each event. The inbound payload becomes the new workflow's input. No WAIT_FOR_WEBHOOK tasks needed in the target workflow. POST any JSON body to /webhook/{id} to start a new 'wait_for_webhook_started_by_event_demo' instance.
name: event-triggered-workflow-webhook
